title: 10 best herbal essential oils for dry nose
description: Boswellia serrata, also known as frankincense, essential oils helps with dry nose because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The oil reduces swelling and congestion, allowing the nasal passages to breathe freely and recover from dryness. It also exhibits antimicrobial properties, helping to combat infections that can exacerbate dry nose.
